canonical_definition: A 3D referring expression comprehension dataset for driving scenarios that evaluates a model's ability to ground a textual command to a specific object in 3D space.
papers: LLM-wrapper: Black-Box Semantic-Aware Adaptation of Vision-Language Models for Referring Expression Comprehension

definitions.text: A 3D referring expression comprehension dataset for driving scenarios that evaluates a model's ability to ground a textual command to a specific object in 3D space.

relationships.paper: LLM-wrapper: Black-Box Semantic-Aware Adaptation of Vision-Language Models for Referring Expression Comprehension
relationships.evidence: Talk2Car (Deruyttere et al., 2019) is a 3D referring expression comprehension dataset of various driving scenarios. (Section 4.1)
